privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task operates on real-world UrbanSim San Francisco data (sanfran_public.h5) from the Metropolitan Transportation Commission. An independent pandas analysis on the dataset confirmed that there are exactly 29 Opportunity Zones out of 187 eligible zones (those with >= 100 total residential units) that satisfy the >50% single-family and <15% missing middle criteria. The expected paths for the Jupyter Notebook, the output CSV, the output chart, and the required 6 CSV columns exactly match the prompt instructions and verifier logic.
